arts.ttl: From Spain: Rodri in Manchester City squad tonight for Bournemouth match
arts.sum: Rodri hasn’t played for Manchester City since picking up a cruciate knee injury in September, which ruled him out for the vast majority of the season and presented problems for Pep Guardiola. In the Spanish midfielder’s absence, Manchester City haven’t had the season they will have desired.
